creator: moose@opera.com
text:
pkg-descr in ports/ports-mgmt/portaudit-db/ has old information on the location of the portaudit port.

is: security/portaudit
should be: ports-mgmt/portaudit

Fix: 

Furthermore committers that want to add entries to the VuXML
 database may use this port to check their changes locally.--54V0wSfcd0TEis3KNQeF56rc9RhBGRm9NBYEx7TOV3Q3Bovv
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- pkg-descr.orig      Wed Mar 28 21:02:53 2007
+++ pkg-descr   Wed Mar 28 21:03:32 2007
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
-In contrast to security/portaudit, which is designed to be an
-install-and-forget solution, portaudit-db requires a current
-ports tree and generates a database that can be used locally
-or distributed over a network.
+In contrast to ports-mgmt/portaudit, which is designed to be
+an install-and-forget solution, portaudit-db requires a
+current ports tree and generates a database that can be used
+locally or distributed over a network.
How-To-Repeat: view ports/ports-mgmt/portaudit-db/pkg-descr
